title: cynorkis ampullifera
intro: Cynorkis ampullifera, also known as the African orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynorkis ampullifera are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antivenom. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
